query: DELETE m FROM messages m JOIN dialogs d ON m.dialogId = d.id JOIN contacts c ON d.contactId = c.id WHERE c.telegramId LIKE 'channel_%' OR c.telegramId LIKE 'group_%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3LPssBLFuVbNm9U.root --database bdpiDWPftxaP5joCkvKLNw --execute DELETE m FROM messages m JOIN dialogs d ON m.dialogId = d.id JOIN contacts c ON d.contactId = c.id WHERE c.telegramId LIKE 'channel_%' OR c.telegramId LIKE 'group_%';
